title: MANGA GOS2 ANGELIC DAYS 5 AND 6
wikitext:
[]: [GOS2] ANGELIC DAYS 5 AND 6 Post by EVA_UNIT_01 » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:42 pm angelic days volume 5 & 6 ?? wikipedia vaguely touches on this: "Volume five begins chronicling Gendo's life as a junior high student along with a young Yui." so, is this real, or fake?

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:46 pm Do you mean if those are the real covers? In GOS2 vol 4, at the end, it talks about the next volume revolving around Gendo and Yui during their school days and the bit about how Kaworu attended the same school as those 2 when they were at school. Vol 6 will be a collection of shorts concerning the rest of the characters.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:47 pm It's real, see these posts and this thread in general: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=72351#72351 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=72296#72296 Hope that helps! ;) EDIT: Whoa. *reads small print* "Based on an orginal story by Gainax and KHARA"!? ....Sigh. I miss Gainax already, but I think Anno and his new studio will get the job done right.

[]: Post by TriLink » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:48 pm It's real. Vol 5 reveals the relationship between Kaworu, Gendo, and Yui back in their Middle School days, and Vol 6 has a bunch of short stories about the children when their all adults. Matter of fact, Vol 5 should arrive stateside any day now. EDIT: Urgh, I need to learn how to type quicker...

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:49 pm The goggles -- they do nothing.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:52 pm Heh, do you mean the artwork?? Or the pairing? ;) (LOVE that Simpsons quote!) I actually prefer the GoS2 manga artwork to the Shinji Ikari Raising Project game artwork, though its different mediums. *shrugs*

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jun 05, 2007 5:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I actually prefer the GoS2 manga artwork to the Shinji Ikari Raising Project game artwork, though its different mediums. *shrugs*

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 05, 2007 6:18 pm Man, I wish I had a thread merge function. :( The main story ends with Volume 4. Further info can be found here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2912
